tasks_completed: scout-high-value-categories: researched code execution, PDF parsing, image generation, QR/URL utilities, math computation; wrote 4 api-eval files; updated portfolio demand_signals
learnings: Newton API (newton.now.sh/api/v2) is free, no key, 15+ math operations — only free Wolfram-style API available. WRAP.
QRServer API (api.qrserver.com) is free, no key, returns PNG/SVG image. Wrap by returning constructed URL rather than fetching binary. WRAP.
Pollinations.ai is free, no key, real AI image generation (Flux/GPT Image/Seedream). Same URL-return pattern. WRAP — highest wow factor.
Piston code execution closed public access Feb 15 2026 — now needs Discord auth token. Added to demand_signals.
PDF extraction: all quality options require paid API keys. No free no-key alternative found. Added to demand_signals.
Email validation: Rapid Email Verifier (fly.dev) is open-source free but unknown reliability for hackathon use. Not worth wrapping now.
Image and math APIs return URL or JSON — both wrappable with our pattern. For binary-returning APIs, return the constructed URL as a string.
